description_long: This is a modern pendant lamp with a wide, shallow circular shade suspended by three thin cables from a central point above. The shade appears to be made from a textured, semi-translucent material, giving it a frosted or crystalline look that diffuses light softly. The lamp's design is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on the interplay between light and material texture. The cables are thin and unobtrusive, emphasizing the floating appearance of the shade. The underside of the shade is slightly recessed, likely to house the light source and further diffuse illumination. This lamp would be suitable for contemporary urban interiors or public spaces, providing both functional and ambient lighting.
description: A modern, wide circular pendant lamp with a textured, frosted shade suspended by thin cables, designed for soft, diffused lighting in urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full circular shade and the three suspension cables converging at the top.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the depth and texture of the shade, with cables still visible.
description_view_2: Another angled view emphasizing the recessed underside and the even distribution of the cables.
description_view_3: Side view showing the shallow profile of the shade and the subtle texture across its surface.
